text: Paper accepted at DIS 2026: StreetDesignAI: A Multi-Persona Evaluation System for Inclusive Infrastructure Design.
New preprint: PEST: Physics-Enhanced Swin Transformer for 3D Turbulence Simulation is now on arXiv.
New preprint: Learning PDE Solvers with Physics and Data: A Unifying View of Physics-Informed Neural Networks and Neural Operators is now on arXiv.
New preprint: Persona-aware and Explainable Bikeability Assessment: A Vision-Language Model Approach is now on arXiv.
Started PhD at the University of Alabama, advised by Prof. Runlong Yu.
Paper accepted at EMNLP 2025: Large Language Model Agents in Finance: A Survey Bridging Research, Practice, and Real-World Deployment.
Paper published in Computers, Environment and Urban Systems: Using Computer Vision and Street View Images to Assess Bus Stop Amenities.
Paper accepted at NeurIPS 2025 Workshop: From Image Generation to Infrastructure Design: A Multi-Agent Pipeline for Street Design Generation.
Graduated with M.S. in Computer Science from the University of Florida.
